title: critesion cordobense
intro_study: According to "Biomolecules", Critesion cordobense benefits include antioxidant, antiproliferative, antimicrobial, and hypolipidemic activities, thanks to the presence of flavonoid, spirostane, furostane, and cholestane glycosides.
side_effects: Critesion cordobense can have side effects if used improperly, such as respiratory problems, allergic reactions, and skin irritation. Prolonged exposure to the plant's oils can also cause dizziness, nausea, and headaches. In severe cases, improper use of Critesion cordobense can lead to liver and kidney damage, as well as an increased risk of seizures and convulsions. It is essential to consult with a medical professional before using Critesion cordobense to avoid these potential side effects.
